nonBlockingIssues.description: deriveMilestoneStatus function could be simplified as it mostly derives status from mission status and milestone order, but doesn't account for actual milestone state persistence
nonBlockingIssues.recommendation: Consider moving derivation logic to domain layer for better testability and consistency

nonBlockingIssues.description: sealMilestone usecase modifies progress object directly when auto-transitioning (line 269: progress.status = 'validating')
nonBlockingIssues.recommendation: Use defensive copying to prevent potential side effects if progress object becomes shared

nonBlockingIssues.description: Tests use hardcoded date strings rather than a helper function or fixture factory
nonBlockingIssues.recommendation: Consider a shared test utility for consistent timestamp generation
